Less than 2 nsec pulsed neutrons were generated
at a repetition rate of 0.5 MHz. The angular distribu-
tion of the source neutron yield was known to within
2.4 percent from Al foil activation measurements.
.Cylinder geometry. The size of the scattering samples
was 3.0 cm in diameter and 7.5 cm in length.
Neutron flight path length was about 8.3 m.
The angular distribution of the source neutron
NE213 liquid scintillator 25.4 cm in diameter
and 10.0 cm in length. The detector was shielded from
source and room scattered neutrons, a shadowbar
and different collimators. The source neutron flux was
monitored by another NE213 scintillator with 5.08 cm
diameter and 5.08 cm length, which was set at zero
degrees with respect to the deuteron beam line.
